case_title: ELAINE TAYLOR VS. SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF NO FEE FOR SERVICE SERVED NOV-08-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-13-2017 - APPEARACE BY BOTH PLINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. AFTER HEARING, MATTER IS TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-13-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK S. RAVINANTAPRICHA. NOT REPORTED. (506). NO EXHIBIT RETAINED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TAYLOR, ELAINE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY THE EVIDENCE DOES NOT SUPPORT THAT PLAINTIFF'S FIRE DAMAGED PROPERTY RESULTED FROM A DANGEROUS CONDITION OF WHICH DEFENDANT WAS AWARE OR SHOULD HAVE BEEN AWARE BUT FAILED TO CORRECT. DEFENDANT HAD NO DUTY TO PREVENT ADDITIONAL DAMAGE TO PLAINTIFF'S PROPERTY AFTER THE FIRE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY TAYLOR, ELAINE AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-13-2017 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TAYLOR, ELAINE ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-13-2017 - JUDGMENT.
